statement: Deferring full OTel integration and implementing internal telemetry events first provides the best near-term ROI for this Convex architecture.
rationale: Internal instrumentation can be implemented with minimal churn and immediate value while preserving later OTel export options.
keyAssumptions: Near-term objective is reliable internal agentic loop, not cross-service observability across many systems.
validationCriteria: First telemetry iteration ships in one sprint and reduces mean time to diagnose run failures.
critiquePoints: If cross-system tracing is an immediate requirement, early OTel may be justified.
questions: What is the threshold for moving from internal events to full OTel backend?
